nasb.text: They journeyed from Etham and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, which faces Baal-zephon, and they camped before Migdol.

esv.text: And they set out from Etham and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, which is east of Baal-zephon, and they camped before Migdol.

cnv.text: 從以倘起行，轉到比哈．希錄，是在巴力．洗分前面，就在密奪對面安營。

ccb.text: 从以倘启行，又折回巴力·洗分对面的比哈·希录，在密夺附近扎营；
